name: Tortelli of Potato and Chives with Brown Butter and Sage
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 6 quarts of water to boil and add 2 tablespoons salt.
2. Crush potatoes with a masher until smooth in a mixing bowl.
3. Add cheese, chives, eggs, and nutmeg; mix well.
4. Roll out pasta to thinnest setting and cut into 4-inch squares.
5. Place 1 tablespoon of potato mixture in center of each square.
6. Fold opposite corners of each square together and press firmly to seal.
7. Form a triangle by bringing the opposite points together.
8. Repeat until all pasta is stuffed and formed into tortelli.
9. Drop pasta into boiling water and cook until tender, about 6 to 7 minutes.
10. Meanwhile, melt butter in a 12 to 14-inch saute pan.
11. Continue cooking until golden brown color (noisette) appears.
12. Add sage leaves and remove from heat.
13. Add lemon juice and set aside.
14. Drain tortelli well; gently pour into saute pan and return to heat.
15. Add remaining chives and cheese, toss to coat, and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
